title: Governance canonization, Mechanicus ultra foundation, and custom IDE foundation on PC
mission_summary: Canonize approved governance documents, harden the local task-entry path, build the first Mechanicus ultra-form foundation as guardian and validator of tools, and create the first custom IDE foundation contracts for Imperium New Reality.

strategic_intent.core: Imperium New Reality becomes the kernel of the future custom IDE.
strategic_intent.ide: The IDE must be built as an extension-capable development zone over the kernel.
strategic_intent.mechanicus: Mechanicus is prioritized because it owns tool registry, validation, command receipts, and safe invocation of tools inside the IDE.
strategic_intent.product_direction: Future owner requests should move toward request-to-product execution through taskpacks, tools, validation, reports, and pushed receipts.

source_context_to_consider: Owner decision: governance candidates may be canonized now
Owner direction: build larger steps toward a custom IDE, not only external IDE integration
Owner direction: Mechanicus must become the first ultra-form organ because it guards and validates all tools

organ_route.DOCTRINARIUM: canonization law, authority wording, capability and IDE concepts
organ_route.OFFICIO_AGENTIS: owner-facing Russian summaries, role entry, language and communication authority
organ_route.ASTRONOMICON: local task entry, registry, route manifest, start ACK, taskpack admission health
organ_route.ADMINISTRATUM: receipts, continuity, report bundles, commit and push closure
organ_route.MECHANICUS: tool registry, command gateway, validators, command receipts, IDE tool invocation foundation
organ_route.INQUISITION: fake-green prevention, safety gates, destructive action blocks, validation downgrade
organ_route.STRATEGIUM: large-step sequencing, KPD, product orientation, next task ladder
organ_route.SCHOLA_IMPERIALIS: lessons, reusable patterns, IDE operating doctrine, operator workflow learning

cyrillic_in_taskpack.scope: MANIFEST.json, TASK_SPEC.md, ACCEPTANCE_GATES.md, OUTPUT_REQUIREMENTS.md, TASK_ROUTE_MANIFEST_TEMPLATE.json, TASK_START_ACK_TEMPLATE.json

localization_exception.scope: owner-facing runtime files only after Officio role entry

allowed_when: new Python files compile if Python files are created
Mechanicus smoke tests pass or exact blockers are recorded
IDE foundation contracts and schemas validate as JSON or Markdown
no secret files or local operator configs are staged
forbidden_push_cases: failed validation without explicit BLOCK verdict
secrets, credentials, or local operator configs staged
destructive cleanup or delete without owner batch approval

local_only_allowed_operations_not_to_com: .git/info/exclude update for local contour_route_config.json if needed
primary_outputs: Governance docs upgraded from CANON_CANDIDATE to CANON_ACTIVE if validation passes
Mechanicus ultra-form registry and schema foundation
Mechanicus local CLI or command surface seed
Imperial IDE foundation contracts and extension model
